Statement : Based on the exploration, the directors of the movies in which Bill Pullman and Jamie Bell have acted are as follows:
- Wim Wenders directed "The End of Violence"
- Harold Becker directed "Malice"
- Jonathan Kaplan directed "Brokedown Palace"
- Mel Brooks directed "Spaceballs"
- Carl Reiner directed "Sibling Rivalry"
- John Dahl directed "The Last Seduction"
- Steve Miner directed "Lake Placid"
- Roland Emmerich directed "Independence Day"
- Jon Amiel directed "Sommersby"
- Wes Craven directed "The Serpent and the Rainbow"
- Jon Turteltaub directed "While You Were Sleeping"
- Donald Petrie directed "The Favor"
- Stephen Daldry directed "Billy Elliot"
- Steven Spielberg directed "The Adventures of Tintin"
- Doug Liman directed "Jumper"
- David Gordon Green directed "Undertow"
- Kevin Macdonald directed "The Eagle"
- Arie Posin directed "The Chumscrubber"
- Edward Zwick directed "Defiance"
